# Downstream Analysis

# Further Learning Resources

-   [NBIS epigenomics workshop (ATACseq tutorial)](https://nbis-workshop-epigenomics.readthedocs.io/en/latest/content/tutorials/atacseq_tutorials.html)
-   [BioCAsia 2020 ATACseqQC presentation](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1P50v1QMjJ_FOEdxZOn60ZROC4Q3FtTwK/edit?slide=id.p30#slide=id.p30)
-   [ATACseq NFcore pipelin](https://nf-co.re/atacseq/2.1.2/)
